title: MUSIC VIDEO B — wider silhouette walk home with porch lights
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: fairy princess — silver tiara, pink-white tutu, wings, wand, jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair.
- @Eva: pumpkin onesie — orange body w/ jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf hat, pumpkin bucket. Curly blonde.
- @Papa: bat — black bat hood w/ red ears + fang print, bat-wing face paint. Bearded.
- @Mama: cozy chaperone — burnt-orange beanie + sweater, mustard pants, kid-flashlight. Blonde hair.
- @Joe: cream-gold Pomeranian dog in red-and-black-spotted ladybug body costume.
- @Ginger: Jack Russell dog (white + tan ginger patches), tiny pumpkin-orange cape.

Camera: drone flyover, slightly higher angle, slow pull back from the family in locked walking formation — designed to LOOP cleanly. Composition anchored on pre-rendered Pattern E group still (image-to-video reference). Motion-only prompt — Suno song mp3 will be overlaid in post; no specific lip-sync.

Scene: @front_fence_sidewalk — leaf-strewn sidewalk, soft warm porch lights softly twinkling from neighboring houses background, soft fall leaves drifting on the breeze.

0:0-1:0 — Drone flyover, slightly higher angle, slow pull back. Locked family formation: @Papa center-left carrying both pumpkin candy buckets one in each hand, shoulders softly bouncing; @Mama center-right beside Papa with flashlight at her side, right hand softly resting on her chest in a warm 'we did it' gesture, beaming; @Sara center-left-foreground holding @Joe's blue leash gently in her right hand and candy bucket in her left, shoulders bouncing softly to the music; @Eva center-right-foreground cradling @Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape, softly nuzzling her cheek to Ginger's head; @Joe trotting softly beside Sara on all four paws, tail wagging. Family humming softly to the warm celebration song with gentle smiles. Mid-clip @Sara and @Eva softly turn their faces toward each other with warm shining sister-smiles, then forward; @Papa and @Mama softly tilt heads toward each other with warm grins, then forward. Soft fall leaves drift gently in the background; soft warm porch lights twinkle softly. Locked formation — no character separates, no character changes positions. Designed to loop.

Lighting: soft warm porch lights drifting from neighboring houses, soft Halloween-night ambience, gentle 'we found her' family-glow.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show music-video, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, mrs patel visible, lisa visible, isabel visible, leo visible, third dog, second pomeranian, two joe, two ginger, second jack russell, ghost dog, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, papa with wolf-mask on face, papa with hair, papa not bald, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, gore, injury, ginger injured, ginger bloody, ginger limp, ginger lifeless, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, ginger airborne, ginger leaping, sara airborne, eva airborne, family separating, family splitting up, characters changing positions, audible singing words, lip-sync to specific syllables, dramatic shouting, ginger as fox, ginger as deer, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: drone flyover from a slightly higher angle, slow pull back, designed to loop cleanly
closingFrame: Drone-flyover composition at @front_fence_sidewalk — @Papa center-left and @Mama center-right behind, @Sara center-left-foreground and @Eva center-right-foreground in front, @Joe trotting softly beside Sara on all four paws, @Ginger cradled in Eva's pumpkin cape; soft warm porch lights twinkling softly in the background; loop point matches opening frame.
